subtitle: A funny and appreciative Father's Day slot machine for Mike from Your Kids.
bigline: Spin for BBQ ribs, woodworking glory, Home Improvement laughs, and Dad-level appreciation.
marqueeStart: 🎰 Mike's Father's Day Slots are open.
marqueeTemplate: Spin {{spinNumber}} of {{spinCount}} for Mike's official Father's Day result.

welcome.title: Welcome to Mike's Father's Day Casino
paragraphs: Your Kids built this Father's Day slot machine for Mike, the dad who is always willing to help.
Expect BBQ ribs, woodworking confidence, Home Improvement energy, and projects that somehow start with only one hour.
Mom is serving as the funny audit person, so all suspicious dad wins may be lovingly reviewed.
welcome.overrideLine: Mom may object, but Ben and Luke already approved the Father's Day fun.

scoreboard.title: Father's Day Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: No cash prizes today, only dad bragging rights and family appreciation.

rules: Mike gets 5 official Father's Day spins.
Every prize is family-friendly, funny, appreciative, and made with love.
Mom may audit the results, but she cannot cancel Dad's official win.
No cash prizes are included in this game.
Dad jokes, BBQ ribs, and helpful project energy are always worth celebrating.

finale.title: 🎉 Official Father's Day Result
finale.note: Mike's official Father's Day result is certified by Your Kids and lovingly inspected by Mom.

footer: Made with love for Mike from Your Kids.

claim.template: This Father's Day prize is a fun family greeting from Your Kids. No cash prize is included.

slots.marqueeStart: 🎰 Mike's Father's Day Slots are open.
slots.marqueeTemplate: Spin {{spinNumber}} of {{spinCount}} for Mike's official Father's Day result.

prizes.title: Father's Day Warmup Win
prizes.msg: Mike wins the official first round of dad appreciation from Your Kids.

prizes.title: Helpful Dad Medal
prizes.msg: Mike wins recognition for always being willing to help, even when the job gets bigger.

prizes.title: Only Takes an Hour Prize
prizes.msg: Mike wins a project estimate that starts at one hour and becomes a full dad adventure.

prizes.title: Dad Celebration Spin
prizes.msg: Mike wins a full Father's Day cheer from everyone who knows he deserves it.

prizes.title: BBQ Ribs Victory Plate
prizes.msg: Mike wins BBQ ribs level respect and the right to judge the sauce like a professional.

prizes.title: Woodworking Legend Bonus
prizes.msg: Mike wins premium sawdust glory and a project that definitely only needs one more board.

prizes.title: Home Improvement Power Grunt
prizes.msg: Mike wins a Home Improvement style power grunt and full control of the dad project zone.

prizes.title: Mom Audit Slip
prizes.msg: Mom reviews the spin and confirms Mike is probably allowed to enjoy this Father's Day win.

prizes.title: Mom Objection Overruled
prizes.msg: Mom raises a playful objection, but Ben and Luke vote that Dad wins anyway.

prizes.title: Ben and Luke Appreciation Prize
prizes.msg: Mike wins a heartfelt reminder that Ben and Luke appreciate his help, humor, and love.

prizes.title: Premium Dad Bonus Round
prizes.msg: Mike wins premium Dad status for being helpful, funny, dependable, and impossible to replace.

prizes.title: 777 Mike Father's Day Jackpot
prizes.msg: Mike wins the top Father's Day jackpot of appreciation from Your Kids, Ben, and Luke.
